content:
The smaller the p-value, the more evidence there is to reject H_0. P-value is the probability of witnessing an event at least as extreme as our result. Reduce p-value if you want to be extra-sure that you have good evidence ot reject H_0.
p-hacking  collected a bunch of data tested a bunch of different things and looked for p-values <0.05 claimed strong evidence for the things that have p-values <0.05 P(at least one of the S_i has a p-value below significance|H_0) = 1 - P(none|H_0) = 1- 0.95^20 …. likely to make false claims.  Good stat research  form a hypothesis, then collect data, then perform a hypothesis test: if p<0.05, reject H_0
summary:
The smaller the p-value, the more evidence there is to reject H_0. P-value is the probability of witnessing an event at least as extreme as our result. Reduce p-value if you want to be extra-sure that you have good evidence ot reject H_0.
p-hacking  collected a bunch of data tested a bunch of different things and looked for p-values <0.05 claimed strong evidence for the things that have p-values <0.
title: P-Hacking
